---
title: "IREF_theoryCSFigures_09-29-25"
author: "Andy"
date: "2025-09-29"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r Setup Config}
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(ggbrace)
library(knitr)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(tidy.opts = list(width.cutoff = 60), tidy = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE) 
theme_set( theme_classic( base_size = 10, base_line_size = 1) +
             theme( panel.border = element_rect( color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.75 ), aspect.ratio = 1 ) )
annot_size <- 9/.pt
```


```{r Figure 1: IREF General Example}
baseline.df <- read.csv("1-1_displacement_baseline.csv")
baseline_summary.df <- read.csv("1-4_displacement_summary.csv") # Find a way to read in the optimums from here

optim <- baseline_summary.df[ 1, 4 ]
optim_fitness <- baseline_summary.df[ 1, 5 ]
optim_CE <- baseline_summary.df[ 1, 6 ]
optim_NCE <- baseline_summary.df[ 1, 7 ]

fig1_a.plot <- ggplot( data = baseline.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ), linewidth = 1 ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed" ) +
  ylab( "Growth and Mortality" ) +
  xlab( "Trait Expression" ) +
  annotate( "text", x = 0.25, y = 0.85, label = "Growth", size = annot_size  ) +
  annotate( "text", x = 0.5, y = 0.35, label = "Mortality", size = annot_size  ) +
  scale_x_continuous( expand = c( 0, 0 ), breaks = c( 0, 0.5, 1 ), labels = c( "Low", "", "High" ) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c( 0, 0 ), breaks = c( 0, 0.5, 1 ) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual( name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" ) ) + 
  theme( plot.margin = margin(10, 15, 10, 10),
         legend.position = "bottom",  
         legend.key = element_rect( fill = "white" ), 
         legend.text = element_text( color = "white" ), 
         legend.title = element_text( color = "white" ) ) +
  guides( color = guide_legend( override.aes = list( color = NA ) ) )

fig1_b.plot <- ggplot( data = baseline.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ), linewidth = 1 ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = fitness, color = "Fitness" ), linewidth = 1 ) +
  geom_vline( xintercept = optim, color = "green", linetype = "dashed" ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Trait Expression") +
  scale_x_continuous( expand = c( 0, 0 ), breaks = c( 0, 0.5, 1 ), labels = c( "Low", "", "High" ) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c( 0, 0 ), breaks = c( 0, 0.5, 1 ) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual( name = "Curve", values = c( "green", "blue", "red" ) ) + 
  theme( axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom",
         plot.margin = margin( 10, 15, 10, 10 ) )

NCE_bar <- annotate( geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025, 
           ymin = 1 - optim_NCE, ymax = 0.998, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5 )
fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
CE_bar <-  annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = 0.001, ymax = optim_CE,
           color = "gray2", fill = "red", alpha = 0.5)
NCE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = 1 - optim_NCE/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_NCE, digits = 2 ) ), 
            color = "blue",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )
CE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE/2 - 0.05,
            label = as.character( round( optim_CE, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "red",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )

fig1_c.plot <- ggplot( data = baseline.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ), size = 1 ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), size = 1, linetype = "dashed" ) +
  ylab( "Growth and Mortality" ) +
  xlab( "Trait Expression" ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + CE_bar +
  NCE_label + fitness_label + CE_label +
  scale_x_continuous( expand = c( 0, 0 ), breaks = c( 0, 0.5, 1 ), labels = c( "Low", "", "High" ) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c( 0, 0 ), breaks = c( 0, 0.5, 1 ) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual( name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" ) ) + 
  theme( plot.margin = margin(10, 15, 10, 10),
         legend.position = "bottom",  
         legend.key = element_rect( fill = "white" ), 
         legend.text = element_text( color = "white" ), 
         legend.title = element_text( color = "white" ) ) +
  guides( color = guide_legend( override.aes = list( color = NA ) ) )


fig1.plot <- plot_grid( fig1_a.plot, fig1_b.plot, fig1_c.plot, ncol = 3, labels = "auto", label_y = 0.75, align = c("hv") )

# ggsave("fig1.png", plot = fig1.plot, dpi = 300)
```


```{r Figure 2: Displacement Rate - Increasing Predator Density}
preddens.df <- read.csv("1-2-1_displacement_preddens.csv")
preddens_pctNCE.df <- read.csv("1-2-2_preddens_TPE_Opt.csv")

# Fig. 2 - predator density
preddens_1.plot <- ggplot( data = baseline.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ), linewidth = 1 ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed" ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + CE_bar +
  NCE_label + fitness_label + CE_label +
  annotate("text", x = 0.125, y = 0.05, label = "P = 0.45", size = annot_size ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Displacement Rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(1000, 500, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
         legend.position = "bottom",
         legend.key = element_rect( fill = "white" ), 
         legend.text = element_text( color = "white" ),
         legend.title = element_text( color = "white" ) ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = NA)))


optim <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 4 ]
optim_fitness <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 5 ]
optim_CE <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 6 ]
optim_NCE <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 7 ]

NCE_bar <- annotate( geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025, 
           ymin = 1 - optim_NCE, ymax = 0.998, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5 )
fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
CE_bar <-  annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = 0.001, ymax = optim_CE,
           color = "gray2", fill = "red", alpha = 0.5)
NCE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = 1 - optim_NCE/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_NCE, digits = 2 ) ), 
            color = "blue",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )
CE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE/2 - 0.05,
            label = as.character( round( optim_CE, digits = 2 ) - 0.01 ),
            color = "red",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )

preddens_2.plot <- ggplot( data = preddens.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ), linewidth = 1 ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed" ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + CE_bar +
  NCE_label + fitness_label + CE_label +
  annotate("text", x = 0.125, y = 0.05, label = "P = 0.90", size = annot_size ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Displacement Rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(1000, 500, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )

preddens_3.plot <- ggplot( data = preddens_pctNCE.df, aes( x = k ) ) +
  geom_point( aes( y = NCE_TPE, fill = Fitness ), color = "black", shape = 21, size = 2.5 ) +
  ylab("% NCE Contribution to TPE") +
  xlab("Predator Density") +
  annotate('text', x = 0.45, y = 0.4, label = 'a') +
  annotate('text', x = 0.9, y = 0.45, label = 'b') +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1) ) +
  scale_fill_continuous( type = "viridis" ) +
  theme( legend.position = "bottom")

preddens_4.plot <- ggplot( data = preddens_pctNCE.df, aes( x = k ) ) +
  geom_point( aes( y = OptimalRITR, fill = Fitness ), shape = 21, size = 2.5 ) +
  ylab("Optimal RITR") +
  xlab("") +
  annotate('text', x = 0.45, y = 0.45, label = 'a') +
  annotate('text', x = 0.9, y = 0.3, label = 'b') +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.50, 1), labels = c(0, 500, 1000) ) +
  scale_fill_continuous( type = "viridis" ) +
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  guides(fill = "none")

preddens.fig <- plot_grid( preddens_1.plot, preddens_4.plot, preddens_2.plot, preddens_3.plot, ncol = 2, labels = c("a", "c", "b", "d"), hjust = -1.75, align = c("hv") )

# ggsave("fig2.png", plot = preddens.fig, dpi = 300)
```


```{r Figure 3: Displacement Rate - Predator Hunting Mode}
predmode.df <- read.csv("1-3-1_displacement_predmode.csv")
predmode_pctNCE.df <- read.csv("1-3-2_predmode_TPE_Opt.csv")

optim <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 4 ]
optim_fitness <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 5 ]
optim_CE <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 6 ]
optim_NCE <- baseline_summary.df[ 2, 7 ]

NCE_bar <- annotate( geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025, 
           ymin = 1 - optim_NCE, ymax = 0.998, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5 )
fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
CE_bar <-  annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = 0.001, ymax = optim_CE,
           color = "gray2", fill = "red", alpha = 0.5)
NCE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = 1 - optim_NCE/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_NCE, digits = 2 ) ), 
            color = "blue",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2 - 0.025, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )
CE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE/2 - 0.05,
            label = as.character( round( optim_CE, digits = 2 ) - 0.01 ),
            color = "red",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )

predmode_1.plot <- ggplot( data = preddens.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ), linewidth = 1 ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed" ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + CE_bar +
  NCE_label + fitness_label + CE_label +
  annotate("text", x = 0.15, y = 0.05, label = "v = 0.2", size = 9/.pt ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Displacement Rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(1000, 500, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom" ) + 
  guides(color = "none")


optim <- baseline_summary.df[ 3, 4 ]
optim_fitness <- baseline_summary.df[ 3, 5 ]
optim_CE <- baseline_summary.df[ 3, 6 ]
optim_NCE <- baseline_summary.df[ 3, 7 ]

NCE_bar <- annotate( geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025, 
           ymin = 1 - optim_NCE, ymax = 0.998, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5 )
fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
CE_bar <-  annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = 0.001, ymax = optim_CE,
           color = "gray2", fill = "red", alpha = 0.5)
NCE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = 1 - optim_NCE/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_NCE, digits = 2 ) ), 
            color = "blue",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2 - 0.025, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )
CE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE/2 - 0.05,
            label = as.character( round( optim_CE, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "red",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )

predmode_2.plot <- ggplot( data = predmode.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ), linewidth = 1 ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed" ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + CE_bar +
  NCE_label + fitness_label + CE_label +
  annotate("text", x = 0.15, y = 0.05, label = "v = 1.0", size = 9/.pt ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Displacement Rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(1000, 500, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )


predmode_3.plot <- ggplot( data = predmode_pctNCE.df, aes( x = v ) ) +
  geom_point( aes( y = NCE_TPE, fill = Fitness ), shape = 21, color = "black", size = 2.5) +
  ylab("% NCE Contribution to TPE") +
  xlab("Predator Velocity") +
  annotate('text', x = 0.2, y = 0.55, label = 'a') +
  annotate('text', x = 1, y = 0.2, label = 'b') +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1) ) +
  scale_fill_continuous( type = "viridis" ) +
  theme( legend.position = "bottom")

predmode_4.plot <- ggplot( data = predmode_pctNCE.df, aes( x = v ) ) +
  geom_point( aes( y = OptimalRITR, fill = Fitness ), shape = 21, color = "black", size = 2.5 ) +
  ylab("Optimal RITR") +
  xlab("Predator Velocity") +
  annotate('text', x = 0.2, y = 0.47, label = 'a') +
  annotate('text', x = 1, y = 0.65, label = 'b') +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.50, 1), labels = c(0, 500, 1000) ) +
  scale_fill_continuous( type = "viridis" ) +
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(),
         legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  guides( fill = "none" )

predmode.fig <- plot_grid( predmode_1.plot, predmode_4.plot, predmode_2.plot, predmode_3.plot, ncol = 2, labels = c("a", "c", "b", "d"), hjust = -1.75, align = c("hv") )

# ggsave("fig3.png", plot = predmode.fig, dpi = 300)
```


```{r Figure 4: Refuge Use - Increasing Resource Processing Rate}
refuge.df <- read.csv("2-1_refuge_res_base.csv")
refuge2.df <- read.csv("2-2_refuge_res_fast_h.csv")
prey_h_pctNCE.df <- read.csv("2-3_refuge_res_TPE_Opt.csv")
refuge_summary.df <- read.csv("2-4_refuge_res_summary.csv") # See above


optim <- refuge_summary.df[ 1, 5 ]
optim_fitness <- refuge_summary.df[ 1, 6 ]
optim_CE <- refuge_summary.df[ 1, 7 ]
optim_NCE <- refuge_summary.df[ 1, 8 ]

NCE_bar <- annotate( geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025, 
           ymin = 1 - optim_NCE, ymax = 0.998, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5 )
fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
CE_bar <-  annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = 0.001, ymax = optim_CE,
           color = "gray2", fill = "red", alpha = 0.5)
NCE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = 1 - optim_NCE/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_NCE, digits = 2 ) ), 
            color = "blue",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2 - 0.025, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )
CE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE/2 - 0.05,
            label = as.character( round( optim_CE, digits = 2 ) - 0.01 ),
            color = "red",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )


refuge_1.plot <- ggplot( data = refuge.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + CE_bar +
  NCE_label + fitness_label + CE_label +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.85, y = 0.95, label = "1/h = 0.1", size = annot_size ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual( name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" ) ) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" ) + 
  guides( color = "none" )


optim <- refuge_summary.df[ 2, 5 ]
optim_fitness <- refuge_summary.df[ 2, 6 ]
optim_CE <- refuge_summary.df[ 2, 7 ]
optim_NCE <- refuge_summary.df[ 2, 8 ]

NCE_bar <- annotate( geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025, 
           ymin = 1 - optim_NCE, ymax = 0.998, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5 )
fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
CE_bar <-  annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = 0.001, ymax = optim_CE,
           color = "gray2", fill = "red", alpha = 0.5)
NCE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = 1 - optim_NCE/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_NCE, digits = 2 ) ), 
            color = "blue",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2 - 0.025, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )
CE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.05, y = optim_CE/2 - 0.05,
            label = as.character( round( optim_CE, digits = 2 ) - 0.01 ),
            color = "red",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )

refuge_2.plot <- ggplot( data = refuge2.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + CE_bar +
  NCE_label + fitness_label + CE_label +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Prop. Time in Refuge") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.85, y = 0.95, label = "1/h = 0.5", size = annot_size ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual( name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" ) ) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )

refuge_3.plot <- ggplot( data = prey_h_pctNCE.df, aes( x = inverse_h ) ) +
  geom_point( aes( y = NCE_TPE, fill = Fitness ), shape = 21, size = 2.5, color = "black" ) +
  ylab("% NCE Contribution to TPE") +
  xlab("Prey Res. Processing Rate (1/h)") +
  annotate('text', x = 0.1, y = 0.475, label = 'a') +
  annotate('text', x = 0.5, y = 0.2, label = 'b') +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1) ) +
  scale_fill_continuous( type = "viridis" ) +
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )


refuge_4.plot <- ggplot( data = prey_h_pctNCE.df, aes( x = inverse_h ) ) +
  geom_point( aes( y = OptimalRITR, fill = Fitness ), shape = 21, size = 2.5, color = "black" ) +
  ylab("Optimal RITR") +
  xlab("") +
  annotate('text', x = 0.1, y = 0.675, label = 'a') +
  annotate('text', x = 0.5, y = 0.19, label = 'b') +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1) ) +
  scale_fill_continuous(type = "viridis") +
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  guides(fill = "none" )

predmode.fig <- plot_grid( refuge_1.plot, refuge_4.plot, refuge_2.plot, refuge_3.plot, ncol = 2, labels = c("a", "c", "b", "d"), hjust = -1.75, align = c("hv") )

# ggsave("fig4.png", plot = predmode.fig, dpi = 300)
```


```{r Figure 5: Refuge Use - Temperature Sensitivity}
therm_refuge.df <- read.csv("3-1_refuge_therm_base.csv")
therm_refuge2.df <- read.csv("3-2_refuge_therm_warmed.csv")
therm_refuge_summary.df <- read.csv("3-3_refuge_therm_summary.csv") # See above


## The growth-trait curve
# a.growth determines the width of the performance curve and should be negative, so that the curve is concave down
# h.growth determines the temperature at which prey growth peaks
# c.growth is a scaling constant
# temp_C is temperature in degrees Celsius
growth.curve_warming <- function( c_g, a_g, h_g, temp_C ){
  c_g * exp( a_g * ( ( temp_C - h_g )^2 ) + 1)
}

a_g.val <- -0.05 # Set a.growth to an arbitrary value that makes the curve broader than the predator's distribution; smaller values yield broader curves
h_g.val <- 20 # Set h.growth to the same point that the predator's density peaks
c_g.val <- 1/exp(1) # c.growth needs to be 1/e for this parameterization to peak at 1

#Make a plot of the initial TPC
temp_vec <- seq( 10, 26, by = 0.1 )
tpc.df <- as.data.frame( mat.or.vec (length(temp_vec), 2) )
colnames(tpc.df) <- c("temperature", "performance")
tpc.df$temperature <- temp_vec
tpc.df$performance <- growth.curve_warming( c_g = c_g.val, a_g = a_g.val, h_g = h_g.val, temp_C = temp_vec)

tpc_labels.df <- as.data.frame( mat.or.vec ( 2, 2 ) )
colnames(tpc_labels.df) <- c("temperature", "performance")
tpc_labels.df$temperature <- c(19, 22)
tpc_labels.df$performance <- c( 0.951229425, 0.818730753)

tpc_1.plot <- ggplot(data = tpc.df, aes( x = temperature, y = performance ) ) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point( data = tpc_labels.df ) +
  geom_text( data = tpc_labels.df, label = c("A", "B"), nudge_x = 1 ) + 
  theme_classic( base_size = 10, base_line_size = 1 ) + 
  ylab("Prey Growth") +
  xlab("Temperature (°C)") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(10, 17.5, 25), labels = c("Cool", "Warm", "Hot") ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1.1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  theme( panel.border = element_rect( color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.75 ), aspect.ratio = 1,
         axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank() ) 

# Plot of Unwarmed Scenario
optim <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 1, 6 ]
optim_fitness <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 1, 7 ]
optim_CE <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 1, 8 ]
optim_NCE <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 1, 9 ]

NCE_bar <- annotate( geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.05, xmax = optim + 0.025, 
           ymin = 1 - optim_NCE, ymax = 0.998, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5 )
fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.05, xmax = optim + 0.025,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
NCE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim - 0.2, y = 1 - optim_NCE/2, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_NCE, digits = 2 ) ), 
            color = "blue",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim - 0.2, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2 - 0.025, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )


therm_refuge_1.plot <- ggplot( data = therm_refuge.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "red" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  NCE_bar + fitness_bar + 
  NCE_label + fitness_label + 
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Prop. Time in Refuge") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
         legend.position = "bottom",
         legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white"), 
         legend.text = element_text(color = "white"), 
         legend.title = element_text(color = "white")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = NA)))


# Repeat TPC plot with new temperatures
tpc_labels2.df <- as.data.frame( mat.or.vec ( 2, 2 ) )
colnames(tpc_labels2.df) <- c("temperature", "performance")
tpc_labels2.df$temperature <- c(21.5, 24.5)
tpc_labels2.df$performance <- c( 0.893597347, 0.363309569)

tpc_2.plot <- ggplot(data = tpc.df, aes( x = temperature, y = performance ) ) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point( data = tpc_labels2.df ) +
  geom_text( data = tpc_labels2.df, label = c("A", "B"), nudge_x = -1 ) + 
  annotate("segment", x = 17.5, y = 0.25, xend = 23, yend = 0.25,
    arrow = arrow(),
    color = "red",
    size = 1) +
  annotate( "text", x = 20, y = 0.4, color = "red", label = "Warming") +
  theme_classic( base_size = 10, base_line_size = 1 ) + 
  ylab("Prey Growth") +
  xlab("Temperature (°C)") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(10, 17.5, 25), labels = c("Cool", "Warm", "Hot") ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1.1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  theme( panel.border = element_rect( color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.75 ), aspect.ratio = 1 )


optim <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 2, 6 ]
optim_fitness <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 2, 7 ]
optim_CE <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 2, 8 ]
optim_NCE <- therm_refuge_summary.df[ 2, 9 ]


fitness_bar <- annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.05,
           ymin = optim_CE, ymax = optim_CE + optim_fitness, 
           color = "gray2", fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.5)
CE_bar <-  annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = optim - 0.025, xmax = optim + 0.05,
           ymin = 0.001, ymax = optim_CE,
           color = "gray2", fill = "red", alpha = 0.5)
fitness_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.1, y = optim_CE + optim_fitness/2 - 0.025, 
            label = as.character( round( optim_fitness, digits = 2 ) ),
            color = "green",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size  )
CE_label <-  annotate( "text", x = optim + 0.1, y = optim_CE/2 - 0.05,
            label = as.character( round( optim_CE, digits = 2 ) - 0.01 ),
            color = "red",
            hjust = "left", size = annot_size )

therm_refuge_2.plot <- ggplot( data = therm_refuge2.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  CE_bar + fitness_bar + 
  CE_label + fitness_label + 
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Prop. Time in Refuge") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )

warming.fig <- plot_grid( tpc_1.plot, therm_refuge_1.plot, tpc_2.plot, therm_refuge_2.plot, ncol = 2, labels = c("a", "c", "b", "d"), hjust = -1.75, align = c("hv") )


# ggsave("fig5.png", plot = warming.fig, dpi = 300)
```


```{r Fig. S1-3, mu/g}
theme_set( theme_classic( base_size = 8, base_line_size = 1) +
             theme( panel.border = element_rect( color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.75 ), aspect.ratio = 1 ) )
annot_size <- 7/.pt

optim <- baseline.df$trait[which(baseline.df$mu_g == min(baseline.df$mu_g))]

# Figs above but mu/g
fig1s_a.plot <- ggplot( data = baseline.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mu_g, color = "μ/g" ) ) +
  geom_vline( xintercept = optim, linetype = "dashed", color = "green" ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(1000, 500, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red", "green" )) + 
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom" ) + 
  guides(color = "none")


optim <- preddens.df$trait[which(preddens.df$mu_g == min(preddens.df$mu_g))]

fig1s_b.plot <- ggplot( data = preddens.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mu_g, color = "μ/g" ) ) +
  geom_vline( xintercept = optim, linetype = "dashed", color = "green" ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(1000, 500, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.2, y = 0.1, label = "P = 0.9", size = annot_size ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red", "green" )) + 
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom" ) + 
  guides(color = "none")


optim <- predmode.df$trait[which(predmode.df$mu_g == min(predmode.df$mu_g))]

fig1s_c.plot <- ggplot( data = predmode.df, aes( x = trait ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mu_g, color = "μ/g" ) ) +
  geom_vline( xintercept = optim, linetype = "dashed", color = "green" ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Displacement Rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(1000, 500, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.2, y = 0.1, label = "v = 1", size = annot_size ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red", "green" )) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )

s1_fig <- plot_grid( fig1s_a.plot, fig1s_b.plot, fig1s_c.plot, ncol = 1, labels = "auto", label_x = 0.35, align = c("hv") )

# ggsave("figS1.png", plot = s1_fig, dpi = 300)



# mu_g plots for habitat selection
theme_set( theme_classic( base_size = 10, base_line_size = 1) +
             theme( panel.border = element_rect( color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.75 ), aspect.ratio = 1 ) )
annot_size <- 8/.pt

fig2s_a.plot <- ggplot( data = refuge.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mu_g, color = "μ/g" ) ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.2, y = 0.1, label = "1/h = 0.1", size = annot_size ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Prop. Time in Refuge") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red", "green" )) + 
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom" ) + 
  guides(color = "none")

fig2s_b.plot <- ggplot( data = refuge2.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mu_g, color = "μ/g" ) ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.2, y = 0.1, label = "1/h = 0.5", size = annot_size ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Prop. Time in Refuge") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red", "green" )) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )

s2_fig <- plot_grid( fig2s_a.plot, fig2s_b.plot, ncol = 1, labels = "auto", label_x = 0.25, align = c("hv") )

# ggsave("figS2.png", plot = s2_fig, dpi = 300)


# Plot of Unwarmed Scenario
fig3s_a.plot <- ggplot( data = therm_refuge.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mu_g, color = "μ/g" ) ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.2, y = 0.1, label = "T1", size = annot_size ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Prop. Time in Refuge") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red", "green" )) + 
  theme( axis.title.x = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom" ) + 
  guides(color = "none")


fig3s_b.plot <- ggplot( data = therm_refuge2.df, aes( x = proptime ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mort_curve, color = "Mortality" ), linetype = "dashed" ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = growth_curve, color = "Growth" ) ) +
  geom_line( aes( y = mu_g, color = "μ/g" ) ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.2, y = 0.1, label = "T2", size = annot_size ) +
  ylab("Growth and Mortality") +
  xlab("Prop. Time in Refuge") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red", "green" )) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )

s3_fig <- plot_grid( fig3s_a.plot, fig3s_b.plot, ncol = 1, labels = "auto", label_x = 0.25, align = c("hv") )

# ggsave("figS3.png", plot = s3_fig, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# Plot optimal RITR vs. predator density, show lines for b - d and mu/g
preddens_mug.df <- read.csv("1-5-1_preddens_mug.csv")
predmode_mug.df <- read.csv("1-5-2_predmode_mug.csv")

fig4s_a.plot <- ggplot( data = preddens_mug.df, aes( x = k ) ) +
  geom_line( data = preddens_pctNCE.df, aes( y = OptimalRITR, color = "b - d" ) ) +
  geom_line( data = preddens_mug.df, aes( y = OptimalRITR, color = "mu_g" ) ) +
  ylab("Optimal RITR") +
  xlab("Predator Density") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  guides(color = "none")

fig4s_b.plot <- ggplot( data = predmode_mug.df, aes( x = v ) ) +
  geom_line( data = predmode_pctNCE.df, aes( y = OptimalRITR, color = "b - d" ) ) +
  geom_line( data = predmode_mug.df, aes( y = OptimalRITR, color = "mu_g" ) ) +
  ylab("Optimal RITR") +
  xlab("Predator Velocity") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1), labels = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1) ) +
  coord_cartesian( xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1) ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Curve", values = c( "blue", "red" )) + 
  theme( legend.position = "bottom" )

s4_fig <- plot_grid( fig4s_a.plot, fig4s_b.plot, ncol = 1, labels = "auto", label_x = 0.25, align = c("hv") )


# ggsave("figS4.png", plot = s4_fig, dpi = 300)
```
